channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House Justice Panel Affirms Fairness in Impeachment Process
item.description: Members of the House Justice Committee emphasized that the impeachment proceedings currently being conducted are consistent and impartial, denying any claims of a double standard. The lawmakers stated...

item.title: Regina Roughriders Seek New Team Mascot Following Gainer the Gopher
item.description: The Regina Roughriders are beginning the search for a new mascot to follow in the footsteps of Gainer the Gopher, a beloved symbol of the team. Fans have long associated Gainer with the Roughriders' s...

item.title: Ramil Madriaga allegedly received threats while in jail, lawyer confirms
item.description: According to Ramil Madriaga's lawyer, he has been threatened inside the jail facility. The lawyer highlighted concerns for Madriaga's safety while in detention and urged authorities to ensure proper p...

item.title: Tanga Leaders Concerned About Excessive Academic Pressure Denying Children Play and Rest
item.description: In Tanga, government officials from the Regional Commissioner's Office and City Council have expressed serious worries during a two-day workshop on Early Childhood Care, Growth and Development. They s...

item.title: Home Secretary outlines stricter rules on asylum support and accommodation
item.description: Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood has announced new measures to tighten the UK's asylum system, targeting those who break the law or work illegally. From June, asylum seekers who contravene regulations c...

item.title: Analysis of the 2026 South Australian Election and the Rise of One Nation
item.description: South Australians are heading to the polls on 21 March 2026, with polls predicting a strong win for Peter Malinauskas’s Labor government. According to political experts, Malinauskas’s personal popular...

item.title: Candon City welcomes PBA All-Star festivities during 50th season
item.description: ILOCOS SUR, Philippines – Candon City showcased its warm Ilocano hospitality as it hosted the PBA All-Star events for the first time in the province. Fans lined the streets on March 5, 2026, eagerly a...

item.title: Counties Need Better Flood Preparedness to Protect Lives and Property
item.description: Floods keep hitting Kenya hard every rainy season, causing plenty of deaths and destroying property across counties. The article says county governments are not ready, reacting only after damage is do...

item.title: Psychologist Shares Four Healthy Distractions to Manage Stress and Regulate Emotions
item.description: In a HuffPost podcast episode of 'Am I Doing It Wrong?', hosts Raj Punjabi-Johnson and Noah Michelson interview psychologist Ryan Martin, dean at the University of Wisconsin-Green Bay and author of 'E...

item.title: PM Shehbaz stresses Pakistan Railways upgrade to strengthen economy
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, while inaugurating the new Shalimar Express and upgraded facilities at Karachi Cantt Station, highlighted the significance of modernising Pakistan Railways to boost the ...

item.title: BRELA urged to improve business registration and digital services
item.description: The Minister for Industry and Trade, Judith Kapinga, has called upon BRELA to accelerate the process of business registration and upgrade its digital systems. The aim is to improve efficiency in servi...

item.title: Niger Arrests DW Journalist Following Report on Nigerian Refugees
item.description: For here for Niamey, Niger, Gazali Abdou Tasawa, who dey work as correspondent for Deutsche Welle (DW), don dey detained since January 23, 2026, after dem interrogate am small for police station. As o...

item.title: Gayton McKenzie Shares Vision for South African Sport Ahead of World Cup
item.description: Sport, Arts and Culture Minister Gayton McKenzie addressed the media at the Freedom Park Heritage Site and Museum in Pretoria on 4 March 2026, outlining his vision for various South African sports. Am...

item.title: European Leaders Push Back Against U.S. Requests Amid Iran Strikes
item.description: Amid recent U.S. strikes on Iran, tensions arose between the United States and several European countries when Donald Trump requested access to airbases in the UK and Spain. Both Prime Minister Sir Ke...

item.title: Liberals Lead in Polls with 49% Support, Mark Carney Enjoys Strong Approval Ratings
item.description: A recent Postmedia-Leger poll conducted between February 27 and March 2 shows the Liberal Party leading Canadian federal politics with 49 per cent of decided voters supporting them, compared to 35 per...

item.title: Trump Signals Imminent Endorsement in Tight Texas Senate Runoff Between Cornyn and Paxton
item.description: President Donald Trump announced on Truth Social that he will soon endorse one candidate in the Republican primary runoff for the U.S. Senate seat in Texas, pitting incumbent Sen. John Cornyn against ...

item.title: US Submarine Sinks Iranian Warship off Sri Lanka; Tensions Escalate
item.description: Airstrikes in Iran have continued for a sixth consecutive day as the United States escalates its bombing campaign. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed that operations will continue 'all day long,...

item.title: US Sinks Iranian Warship Near Indian Waters, Raising Concerns Over Regional Security
item.description: Former Indian military officers, diplomats, and analysts have described the recent sinking of the Iranian warship IRIS Dena by a US submarine off the coast of Sri Lanka as a serious strategic embarras...

item.title: South African Comedian and Actor Soli Philander Dies at 65
item.description: Veteran South African comedian and actor Soli Philander has passed away at the age of 65, as confirmed by Gayton McKenzie, the Minister of Sports, Arts and Culture. Philander was celebrated for his ab...

item.title: African News Roundup: Diaspora Citizenship Pause in Ghana, Polio Outbreak in Malawi, Tigray Clashes, Niger-ISIL Attack Repelled, and Widespread Flooding Crisis
item.description: This AllAfrica roundup for February 3, 2026, covers several key developments across the continent. In Ghana, the government has temporarily paused applications for diaspora citizenship to improve the ...
